title: Gentle Golden Norwegian Meat Substitute Kebabs
description: A sweet and pillowy Norwegian dish featuring ground nut oil and char-grill flavor, perfect for a crowd, and friendly to plant-based diets. This dish is a unique blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Cut the tofu into 1 inch cubes and thread onto the skewers.
In a small bowl, whisk together the ground nut oil, maple syrup, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the tofu cubes.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as roasted vegetables or quinoa.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
